mapper.select:
SELECT ID JK_INFO SJSB_TYPE SJSB_STATUS SERVICE_ID SERVICE_FIELD_I SERVICE_FIELD_II SERVICE_FIELD_III REQUEST_PARAMETERS RETURN_RESULT FAIL_REASON REMARK CREATE_BY CREATE_BY_NAME CREATE_TIME FROM M_SJSB_LOG
id = #{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO M_SJSB_LOG(ID, JK_INFO, SJSB_TYPE, SJSB_STATUS, SERVICE_ID, SERVICE_FIELD_I, SERVICE_FIELD_II, SERVICE_FIELD_III, REQUEST_PARAMETERS, RETURN_RESULT, FAIL_REASON, REMARK, CREATE_BY, CREATE_BY_NAME, CREATE_TIME) VALUES (#{id}, #{jkInfo, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{sjsbType, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{sjsbStatus, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{serviceId, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{serviceFieldI, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{serviceFieldIi, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{serviceFieldIii, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{requestParameters, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{returnResult, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{failReason, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{remark, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{loginUserId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{loginUserName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{now})
mapper.update:
UPDATE M_SJSB_LOG SET JK_INFO = #{jkInfo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, SJSB_TYPE = #{sjsbType,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, SJSB_STATUS = #{sjsbStatus,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, SERVICE_ID = #{serviceId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, SERVICE_FIELD_I = #{serviceFieldI,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, SERVICE_FIELD_II = #{serviceFieldIi,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, SERVICE_FIELD_III = #{serviceFieldIii,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, REQUEST_PARAMETERS = #{requestParameters,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, RETURN_RESULT = #{returnResult,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, FAIL_REASON = #{failReason,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, REMARK = #{remark,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, UPDATE_BY = #{loginUserId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, UPDATE_BY_NAME = #{loginUserName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, UPDATE_TIME = #{now}
id = #{id}

UPDATE M_SJSB_LOG SET SJSB_STATUS = '成功' WHERE SERVICE_ID IN ( SELECT SERVICE_ID FROM M_SJSB_LOG WHERE RETURN_RESULT LIKE '%{"code":400,"success":false,"data":{},"msg":"新增数据已经存在,不允许重复新增"}%' OR RETURN_RESULT LIKE '%{"code":400,"success":false,"data":{},"msg":"新增数据不允许重复发送"}%' )
